steps.t: Galasdil has asked you to destroy any witch's crown plants that you might find within Sant Lhoer, the Poison Garden. Sant Lhoer is in Carn Dûm.
You have put to torch many witch's crown, and Galasdil will be happy to hear of your efforts. Galasdil is located at Bail Avarc, outside of Carn Dûm.
